title: Conduct an internal audit of a documented program
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct an internal audit of a documented program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan the audit

pcs.text: Interpret audit schedule and plan and organise the timely conduct of internal audit
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret audit schedule and plan and organise the timely conduct of internal audit?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret audit schedule and plan and organise the timely conduct of internal audit.

pcs.text: Determine objectives, scope and criteria of audit according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine objectives, scope and criteria of audit according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine objectives, scope and criteria of audit according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Assemble and brief audit team about the objectives, scope and criteria of the audit
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble and brief audit team about the objectives, scope and criteria of the audit?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble and brief audit team about the objectives, scope and criteria of the audit.

pcs.text: Notify those affected by and involved in the audit, and document responsibilities according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Notify those affected by and involved in the audit, and document responsibilities according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Notify those affected by and involved in the audit, and document responsibilities according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Notify stakeholders involved in an internal audit according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Notify stakeholders involved in an internal audit according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Notify stakeholders involved in an internal audit according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Identify procedures, records and workplace documentation needed for the audit
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify procedures, records and workplace documentation needed for the audit?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify procedures, records and workplace documentation needed for the audit.

pcs.text: Document evidence collection methods and sources to be used during the audit, including developing workplace checklists according to workplace specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document evidence collection methods and sources to be used during the audit, including developing workplace checklists according to workplace specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document evidence collection methods and sources to be used during the audit, including developing workplace checklists according to workplace specifications.

pcs.text: Conduct a document review prior to audit
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct a document review prior to audit?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct a document review prior to audit.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan the audit

elements.title: Conduct the audit

pcs.text: Conduct an entry meeting with relevant parties to explain the purpose, scope and criteria for the audit, the methods to be used for conducting the audit, and procedures for reporting and following up results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct an entry meeting with relevant parties to explain the purpose, scope and criteria for the audit, the methods to be used for conducting the audit, and procedures for reporting and following up results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct an entry meeting with relevant parties to explain the purpose, scope and criteria for the audit, the methods to be used for conducting the audit, and procedures for reporting and following up results.

pcs.text: Conduct an audit of the program according to workplace and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct an audit of the program according to workplace and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct an audit of the program according to workplace and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Use effective communication skills when conducting the audit
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use effective communication skills when conducting the audit?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use effective communication skills when conducting the audit.

pcs.text: Collect verifiable objective evidence against the criteria of the audit
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect verifiable objective evidence against the criteria of the audit?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect verifiable objective evidence against the criteria of the audit.

pcs.text: Make findings using the objective evidence against the audit criteria
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make findings using the objective evidence against the audit criteria?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make findings using the objective evidence against the audit criteria.

pcs.text: Identify and categorise non-conformances according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and categorise non-conformances according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and categorise non-conformances according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Record audit activity according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record audit activity according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record audit activity according to workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Conduct the audit

elements.title: Report on audit findings

pcs.text: Prepare an audit report, detailing areas of the program that were audited and findings against the audit criteria, including non-conformances
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare an audit report, detailing areas of the program that were audited and findings against the audit criteria, including non-conformances?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare an audit report, detailing areas of the program that were audited and findings against the audit criteria, including non-conformances.

pcs.text: Document objective evidence according to workplace standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document objective evidence according to workplace standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document objective evidence according to workplace standards.

pcs.text: Keep records of audit process, objective evidence and findings according to workplace and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Keep records of audit process, objective evidence and findings according to workplace and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Keep records of audit process, objective evidence and findings according to workplace and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Report findings according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report findings according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report findings according to workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Report on audit findings

elements.title: Confirm and close out corrective action

pcs.text: Verify the effectiveness of corrective actions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify the effectiveness of corrective actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify the effectiveness of corrective actions.

pcs.text: Maintain records of the effectiveness of corrective actions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records of the effectiveness of corrective actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records of the effectiveness of corrective actions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Confirm and close out corrective action
